features.text: Updated mandatory inspection image capture by packaging and product section
Added gallery-or-camera source picker for inspection uploads
Improved Ops inspection detail metadata, side images, and captured image grouping
Added auth build badge with cache/storage clear reload action
Added New Delhi fallback coordinates when browser location is unavailable
Moved supplier plant capture to inbound inspections
Updated Ops form step order and copy
Added date range API wiring for operations and executive analytics
Removed extra list fetch from Ops inspection detail page
Masters for users, product categories, products and warehouses
Inspections, logins, devices, and release notes modules
